originContent: # VHVR-Mod
translatedContent: # VHVR-Mod

originContent: This is an experimental mod for the PC game Valheim that adds in native VR support using Unity and SteamVR with OpenVR.
translatedContent: This is an experimental mod for the PC game Valheim that adds in native VR support using Unity and SteamVR with OpenVR.

originContent: Download the mod at [Nexus Mods](https://www.nexusmods.com/valheim/mods/847)!
translatedContent: Download the mod at [Nexus Mods](https://www.nexusmods.com/valheim/mods/847)!

originContent: Check out the development log of progress on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9EDvRwka57-swWbcOAq0lhIp5jSFPg-u).
translatedContent: Check out the development log of progress on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9EDvRwka57-swWbcOAq0lhIp5jSFPg-u).

originContent: Join the [Flatscreen to VR Modding Discord](https://discord.gg/ZFSCSDe)
translatedContent: Join the [Flatscreen to VR Modding Discord](https://discord.gg/ZFSCSDe)

originContent: ## What's in this package?
translatedContent: ## What's in this package?

originContent: ### Unity Project
translatedContent: ### Unity Project

originContent: This project exists primarily as an asset generator to produce necessary AssetBundles used by the mod as well as a way to build SteamVR and Unity XR libraries necessary in the proper environment.
translatedContent: This project exists primarily as an asset generator to produce necessary AssetBundles used by the mod as well as a way to build SteamVR and Unity XR libraries necessary in the proper environment.

originContent: There are several assets being generated in the Unity package, but the most important include:
translatedContent: There are several assets being generated in the Unity package, but the most important include:

originContent: * SteamVR Player prefab: This prefab is a Unity GameObject hierarchy that includes allt he needed scripts to properly use SteamVR. It includes a Camera in the hierarchy that will be swapped out for the main game's camera. The camera is configured to use stereoscopic 3D displayed in the HMD.
translatedContent: * SteamVR Player prefab: This prefab is a Unity GameObject hierarchy that includes all the needed scripts to properly use SteamVR. It includes a Camera in the hierarchy that will be swapped out for the main game's camera. The camera is configured to use stereoscopic 3D displayed in the HMD.

originContent: * Unity and OpenVR assets: These are assets required to properly bootstrap Unity's XR engine when the game starts up.
translatedContent: * Unity and OpenVR assets: These are assets required to properly bootstrap Unity's XR engine when the game starts up.

originContent: * [Amplify Occlusion](https://github.com/AmplifyCreations/AmplifyOcclusion) graphics post-processor: Used as a higher performance substitute to in game SSAO graphics effect.
translatedContent: * [Amplify Occlusion](https://github.com/AmplifyCreations/AmplifyOcclusion) graphics post-processor: Used as a higher performance substitute to in game SSAO graphics effect.

originContent: ### ValheimVRMod C# Project
translatedContent: ### ValheimVRMod C# Project

originContent: This project contains the bulk of the code for the mod. It includes classes/Unity MonoBehaviour scripts that implement the following functionality:
translatedContent: This project contains the bulk of the code for the mod. It includes classes/Unity MonoBehaviour scripts that implement the following functionality:

originContent: * initialize Unity's/OpenVR XR engine
translatedContent: * initialize Unity's/OpenVR XR engine

originContent: * instantiate the SteamVR prefabs from the AssetBundles
translatedContent: * instantiate the SteamVR prefabs from the AssetBundles

originContent: * swap out the game's main camera with the VR camera and position it appropriately
translatedContent: * swap out the game's main camera with the VR camera and position it appropriately

originContent: * translates the game's GUI into VR
translatedContent: * translates the game's GUI into VR

originContent: * implements motion controls (WIP)
translatedContent: * implements motion controls (WIP)

originContent: ### Requirements
translatedContent: ### Requirements

originContent: This mod requires [BepInExPack Valheim](https://valheim.thunderstore.io/package/denikson/BepInExPack_Valheim/). BepInEx is a mod framework for Unity games that allows modders to inject their code into the game's runtime. It also includes [Harmony](https://harmony.pardeike.net/articles/intro.html), which is a tool used to patch existing methods in C# libraries.
translatedContent: This mod requires [BepInExPack Valheim](https://valheim.thunderstore.io/package/denikson/BepInExPack_Valheim/). BepInEx is a mod framework for Unity games that allows modders to inject their code into the game's runtime. It also includes [Harmony](https://harmony.pardeike.net/articles/intro.html), which is a tool used to patch existing methods in C# libraries.

originContent: Additionally, you need an HMD that supports OpenVR/SteamVR.
translatedContent: Additionally, you need an HMD that supports OpenVR/SteamVR.

originContent: ### Other Info
translatedContent: ### Other Info

originContent: This is an experimental mod and almost certainly will contain a bunch of bugs and glitches. Additionally, Valheim is currently an early access game, so there is a high probability that patches will be released for the game that break this mod. Please be patient as fixes are worked on and feel free to report any issues you find :)
translatedContent: This is an experimental mod and almost certainly will contain a bunch of bugs and glitches. Additionally, Valheim is currently an early access game, so there is a high probability that patches will be released for the game that break this mod. Please be patient as fixes are worked on and feel free to report any issues you find :)

originContent: As Valheim was not made for VR, this implementation isn't going to be as comfortable as a built-for-VR game. If VR tends to make you feel queasy, then this mod probably isn't for you.
translatedContent: As Valheim was not made for VR, this implementation isn't going to be as comfortable as a built-for-VR game. If VR tends to make you feel queasy, then this mod probably isn't for you.
